history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 02 column C, which is lava, so that is unsafe. To avoid lava, I should turn clockwise to face down and then move toward the open path below.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe, and moving forward brings me closer to the goal without entering lava.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe, and it moves me toward the goal at row 04 column D. So the best next action is to go forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down, but the goal is to my right at row 04 column D. Moving forward would hit the wall boundary at row 05, so I need to turn to face right first. Clockwise rotation will set me up to move toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing left, which means moving forward would go into the wall at column A. The goal is at row 04 column D, so I need to turn around to face right. From left, two clockwise rotations or one counter-clockwise rotation would face right; counter-clockwise is the fastest.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The goal is still to my right at row 04 column D, and the cell below is blocked by the wall boundary. I should rotate clockwise to face right and then proceed on the next step.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing left again. The safe path to the goal is to the right, so I need to turn around. Since I am facing left, a clockwise rotation will make me face up, and another clockwise rotation would be needed to face right; however, with only one action available now, the best immediate step is to rotate clockwise toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. Moving forward would go to row 03 column B, which is safe floor. This moves me closer to the goal area and avoids the lava column at C, so I should advance.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03 column B facing up. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column B is safe floor, while column C is lava, so I should keep moving forward to stay on the safe path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing up. The cell ahead is a wall boundary, so I cannot move forward. The goal is to my right, but the cell at C is lava, so the safe way to continue is to rotate clockwise and then navigate around it.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so I must not move forward. To avoid stepping into lava, I should turn downward to look for a safe route.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is safe floor, so moving forward is the best next step to continue around the lava column toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe and leads closer to the goal area, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead is a wall boundary, so I cannot continue forward. The goal is to my right at row 04 column D, and the cell at row 04 column C is safe floor, so I should turn left to face right and proceed toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The next cell row 04 column C is safe floor, and moving forward will bring me directly next to the goal at row 04 column D. 
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
